brief: Geopolitical tensions escalate with US seeking $80B for Iran war and Trump imposing 50% tariffs on Canada, while Houthis threaten Red Sea shipping. In tech, Anthropic's $1.5B copyright settlement is approved, and Google announces new AI models. Research explores AI-assisted evaluation and multitasking agents.
news_summary: The Pentagon requests $80 billion for Iran conflict, Trump announces 50% tariffs on Canada, Houthis threaten shipping in the Red Sea, and a judge approves Anthropic's $1.5 billion copyright settlement with authors.
papers_summary: Papers focus on AI-assisted information evaluation, designing communication for multitasking with computer use agents, and adapting LLM code explanations to diverse problem-solvers' needs.

en.brief: Geopolitical tensions escalate with US seeking $80B for Iran war and Trump imposing 50% tariffs on Canada, while Houthis threaten Red Sea shipping. In tech, Anthropic's $1.5B copyright settlement is approved, and Google announces new AI models. Research explores AI-assisted evaluation and multitasking agents.
en.news_summary: The Pentagon requests $80 billion for Iran conflict, Trump announces 50% tariffs on Canada, Houthis threaten shipping in the Red Sea, and a judge approves Anthropic's $1.5 billion copyright settlement with authors.
en.papers_summary: Papers focus on AI-assisted information evaluation, designing communication for multitasking with computer use agents, and adapting LLM code explanations to diverse problem-solvers' needs.

zh.brief: 英国新任首相贝安德就职，厦门翔安机场距金门仅三公里引发安全关切。智能戒指早于用户得知怀孕，科技股吸引亚洲年轻人。
zh.news_summary: 贝安德接替施纪贤任英国首相；深圳地铁因APEC加强安检引民怨；厦门机场靠近金门引发台湾国安疑虑。
zh.papers_summary: 今日无优先级中文论文摘要。

todays_image.caption: Just as Lobophora sp. algae spreads unpredictably across reefs, the push for more war funding threatens to entangle the U.S. deeper in an escalating conflict.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
